title: Department Manager Vacancy at ProSport - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at ProSport - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, ProSport in Gwalior is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ProSport:
ProSport is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ProSport!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
